'''Irith''' was a terrestrial<ref name="DES" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE Irith">{{CSWECite|II|115|Irith}}</ref> located in the [[Irith system/Legends|Irith system]], a part of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] portion of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. It was a motley stop on the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] between the [[Du Hutta system/Legends|Du Hutta]] and [[Nar Bo Sholla system/Legends|Nar Bo Sholla systems]]. An overcrowded, polluted world,<ref name="TEA" /> Irith was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the criminal [[Romort Raort]], where, during his [[Youngling/Legends|childhood]], he was a bully who shaked down other children for their [[Diet/Legends|lunch]] [[Currency/Legends|money]].<ref name="DES" />

The [[hyperwave signal interceptor]]s at the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Oktos Zone Imperial Outpost]] on the planet [[Toydaria/Legends|Toydaria]] could monitor [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]] activity at Irith.<ref name="LoNH">''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''</ref> The Irith [[Star system/Legends|system]] was [[Battle of the Irith system|conquered]] by the military forces of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at some point between [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] and [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Irith was first mentioned in the ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', [[Michael Allen Horne]]'s [[1993]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DES" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed it in grid square S-11.<ref name="TEA" />
